label: 动感斜角版
texture_guidance: 倾斜食物摆盘、动态运动轨迹、斜置容器带出汁液流动感、速度模糊边缘、有角度的光影切面。
scene_prompt: DYNAMIC ANGLE IMPACT DESIGN. light: dramatic cross-lighting from two opposing directions (upper-left warm + lower-right cool) creating strong chiaroscuro; motion-blur on non-focal elements to enhance speed sensation. material: food shot from a tilted/Dutch angle (15-25 degree canvas tilt), sauce pouring mid-air, chopsticks lifting noodles with steam trailing, wok toss frozen mid-flip; surface textures of rough stone, brushed metal, or scorched wood; no static flat-lay feeling. color: choose ONE bold duo-tone palette per generation — (a) electric red #D62828 + jet black #0D0D0D, (b) saffron yellow #F7B32B + midnight navy #1B1B3A, (c) lime green #5FD35F + volcanic gray #2D2D2D; secondary accent below 10% canvas. composition: TILTED DYNAMIC — the entire composition sits at a 10-20 degree rotational tilt, creating inherent motion and tension. Hero food element placed at a dynamic intersection (rule-of-thirds power point but rotated), 45-55% of canvas. Title text follows the tilt angle or contrasts it at perpendicular, set in ultra-bold condensed sans-serif at large scale. Supporting elements (price tag, badge, CTA) float at opposing angles. The design should feel like it's MOVING, not resting. avoid: no centered symmetric layouts, no horizontal calm baselines, no split-screen composition, no delicate thin fonts, no muted earth tones, no whitespace-heavy minimal approach.
design_lessons: 倾斜构图打破视觉惯性，让静态画面产生运动感和紧迫感，特别适合快节奏、年轻化的促销场景。不需要分割线就能制造强烈冲击力。
